                                          Distinct in filter

                                          Expense flow - department · attribution · customer

                                          Flows reflect the current filters. Department totals split into attributed vs unattributed spend; attributed amounts continue to GL customer.

                                          Average expense submission time by employee

                                          Cycle time = days from Purchase date to Submission Date (filtered rows only; employees need both dates on at least one line). Sorted highest average first.

                                          No lines with both purchase and submission dates in the current filter.

                                          Customer attribution

                                          Customer Spend % of attributed % of total

                                          No attributed spend in the current filter.

                                          Spend by department by month

                                          Click a segment to open matching lines in the drawer.

                                          Spend by category by month

                                          Blank categories appear as Uncategorized. Long tail rolls into Other.

                                          Software spend by vendor by month

                                          Software category only; vendors outside the top N roll into Other. Click a segment for line detail.

                                          No software-category spend in the current filter.

                                          Software vendor risk map

                                          Software category only. Each bubble is one vendor for the focus month you select below. X = month-over-month growth vs the prior month in view; Y = calendar year-to-date spend through that month; size = transaction count in the focus month. Color = vendor. Dashed lines mark the median on each axis.

                                          • Top-right - dangerous growth + high spend
                                          • Bottom-right - fast growth but still small
                                          • Top-left - expensive but stable
                                          • Bottom-left - low spend and stable or declining

                                          No software-category spend in the current filter for the selected month.
